project: Dev Panel Overhaul — Unified Admin Control Room
description: Consolidate the split /dev/ and /admin/ views into a single dev panel at /dev/. Delete duplicate admin views. Restructure the monolithic GameDetailLive (~2,343 lines) into a tabbed interface. Add quick-create presets, fix bot-seat conflicts, and enable cascading cleanup on room deletion.

features.description: Delete admin views and routes — remove the duplicate /admin/ scope and its read-only LiveViews
steps: Delete file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/lobby_live.ex (module: PidroServerWeb.LobbyLive)
Delete file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/game_monitor_live.ex (module: PidroServerWeb.GameMonitorLive)
Delete file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/stats_live.ex (module: PidroServerWeb.StatsLive)
Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/router.ex
Remove the /admin scope (lines 44-50) and admin_basic_auth plug
Delete any admin-specific test files if they exist (grep for LobbyLive, GameMonitorLive, StatsLive in test/)
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors referencing deleted modules

features.description: Fix BotManager.start_bots to skip occupied seats instead of filling from north regardless of occupancy
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server/games/bots/bot_manager.ex
Find start_bots/4 (lines 43-57)
Add a call to RoomManager.get_room(room_code) to query occupied positions
Filter the position list [:north, :east, :south, :west] to only empty seats
Fill empty seats up to bot_count
If fewer empty seats than bot_count, return {:error, :not_enough_seats}
Keep existing return type {:ok, [pid()]} on success
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors; dependency direction is BotManager → RoomManager (read-only)

features.description: Add cascading cleanup on room deletion — stop bots and game processes before closing the room
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_list_live.ex
Find the room deletion handler
Add BotManager.stop_all_bots(room_code) and GameSupervisor.stop_game(room_code) calls before close_room — do this in the LiveView handler, not inside RoomManager GenServer
Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_detail_live.ex
Find the assign_seat handler
Add check: if a bot occupies the target position, call BotManager.stop_bot(room_code, position) before reassigning
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors

features.description: Clean up dead code in GameDetailLive — remove commented-out position buttons and unused helpers
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_detail_live.ex
Delete commented-out position buttons (lines ~982-1060)
Remove any helper functions that become unused after admin view deletion
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors or warnings about unused functions

features.description: Write tests for Phase 1 — bot seat-skipping and cascading cleanup
steps: Create test file: apps/pidro_server/test/pidro_server/games/bots/bot_manager_test.exs
Write test: start_bots skips occupied seats (host at north, request 3 bots → bots at east/south/west)
Write test: start_bots returns {:error, :not_enough_seats} when not enough empty seats
Write test: after room deletion, BotManager.list_bots(room_code) returns []
Run: mix test apps/pidro_server/test/pidro_server/games/bots/bot_manager_test.exs
Verify: All tests pass

features.description: Add 'Empty Room' and '1H + 3B' preset buttons — simple presets with straightforward bot assignment
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_list_live.ex
Add a row of preset buttons above the existing creation form
Implement 'Empty Room' preset: create room with dev host at north, no bots, 3 empty seats
Implement '1H + 3B' preset: create room with dev host at north, call start_bots to fill remaining 3 seats
After creation, navigate to the new room's detail view
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors

features.description: Add '2H + 2B' and '4 Bots' preset buttons — presets requiring careful seat assignment to avoid race conditions
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_list_live.ex
Implement '2H + 2B' preset: create room with dev host at north, 2 bots at east and west, south left empty for a second human
Implement '4 Bots' preset: create room, assign bot IDs to all 4 seats via dev_set_position *before* starting bot processes (avoids 4-player auto-start firing before the host is displaced)
On bot failure in any preset: call BotManager.stop_all_bots(room_code) in the error branch
After creation, navigate to the new room's detail view
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors

features.description: Add phase and scores columns to the room table in GameListLive
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_list_live.ex
Add game phase column to the room table (e.g., 'Trick 3', 'Bidding')
Add scores column showing N/S vs E/W for active/finished games
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors

features.description: Add tab infrastructure to GameDetailLive — @active_tab assign, tab bar component, and conditional rendering shell
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_detail_live.ex
Add @active_tab assign (default :board) in mount/3
Sync @active_tab with URL param ?tab=board via handle_params
Extract defp render_tab_bar(assigns) — horizontal tab navigation with Board and Seats & Bots tabs
Update render/1 to: render tab bar, then conditionally render active tab content
For now, wrap existing template content as the :board tab and add a placeholder for :seats_bots tab
Preserve all existing handle_event and handle_info clauses — no logic changes
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors; tab switching works

features.description: Extract Board tab content into defp render_board_tab — card table, actions, replay, raw state
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_detail_live.ex
Identify all template sections that belong on the Board tab: CardComponents.card_table, legal actions panel, quick actions (auto-bid/auto-play), replay controls, raw state JSON collapsible
Move that markup into defp render_board_tab(assigns)
Update render/1 to call render_board_tab(assigns) for the :board tab
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors; Board tab renders identically to before

features.description: Extract Seats & Bots tab content into defp render_seats_tab — seat assignment and bot configuration
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_detail_live.ex
Identify all template sections for seat management: 4-seat visual layout, per-seat occupant info, assign user dropdown, start/stop bot, bot config (difficulty/strategy/delay), pause/resume
Move that markup into defp render_seats_tab(assigns)
Replace the :seats_bots placeholder from 3.1 with render_seats_tab(assigns)
Target: main render/1 under 50 lines (tab bar + conditional render calls)
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors; render/1 is under 50 lines; Seats & Bots tab renders correctly

features.description: Add Take a Seat shortcut on the Board tab — convenience button using existing seat assignment mechanism
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_detail_live.ex
Add a 'Take Seat' button on the Board tab that shows a position picker (North/South/East/West)
Position picker also shows the existing user dropdown to select which user to seat
On submit, call RoomManager.dev_set_position(room_code, position, user_id) — same mechanism as the Seats & Bots tab
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors

features.description: Implement god mode with manual position selection — default to :all (all hands visible), click to switch perspective
steps: Open file: apps/pidro_server/lib/pidro_server_web/live/dev/game_detail_live.ex
Default selected_position to :all on mount
Add click handler: clicking a position name switches to that player's perspective and shows their legal actions
Add click handler: clicking 'All' / god-mode toggle returns to :all view
Highlight current turn prominently so the admin knows who to click
Run: mix compile
Verify: No compilation errors

final_checks: Room dashboard shows all rooms with status, players, phase, scores
Quick-create presets work in one click, navigate to detail view
start_bots skips occupied seats (no more bot-seat conflicts)
Room deletion cascades: bots stopped, game process stopped
Reassigning a bot's seat auto-stops the bot
Game detail view has 2 tabs: Board and Seats & Bots
Board tab shows CardComponents.card_table with god mode on by default
Admin can take a seat from the Board tab via position picker + user dropdown
Seats & Bots tab shows per-seat controls with bot config
Raw state JSON accessible as collapsible on Board tab
No new LiveComponents — follow existing function component pattern
No new modules for template extraction — use private defp render functions
All PubSub subscriptions inside if connected?(socket) guard
mix compile succeeds with no warnings
